_comment: The ratchet. best[scenario] = highest weighted score that scenario has reached. iterations[] is the append-only ledger. A candidate merges only if aggregate improves AND no scenario < its best here.

iterations.diagnosis: Set-vs-session conflation: history.tsx appends one entry per completed SET, but HistoryHero counted history.length as sessions. One 3-set workout fabricated a '3 sessions logged' PR curve, defeating the MIN_SESSIONS=3 gate. Compounded across kgUnit/prHeavy/sparse/dense (inflated counts).
iterations.convergence: All 3 candidates independently found the same root cause.

winner.summary: Extracted inline useLiftSeries into pure RN-free buildLiftSeries; group history by calendar day so 1 session = 1 day; gate/count/curve on distinct days; added actionable empty state (progress pips toward the 3-session unlock); golden test.

winner.strategy: Reframe the WorkoutCard PR chip from 'ties the all-time max (>=)' to 'new all-time best at time logged' (strictly beats every prior training day). New RN-free buildPRDays(exerciseStats) collapses history to one day-bucket per training day, walks oldest->newest tracking a running max, and records each day that strictly exceeds it (first-ever day excluded). WorkoutCard now takes prDays and computes isPR via dayKeyOf(workout.createdAt).
